title: 8 Small Surrenders That Build a Godly Man's Self-Control
caption:
Self-control isn't one big moment. It's eight small ones a day, most of them so small you'd never call them discipline.

The extra ten minutes in bed. The reply you didn't have to send. The second plate you didn't need. The last word in the argument. None of them look like a war. All of them are.

A godly man doesn't win the big fights first. He wins the small ones nobody's watching.

#faith #selfcontrol #christianman #discipline #godlyman
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
